backend/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Maven builder base image to use OpenJDK 21 instead of OpenJDK 17.
backend/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code is being migrated to Java 21; using a JDK 17 builder would fail to compile Java 21 source code or features.

backend/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the runtime base image to use OpenJDK 21 instead of OpenJDK 17.
backend/Dockerfile.why_exists: The compiled application requires the Java 21 runtime environment to execute; running on JDK 17 would result in a NoSuchMethodError or similar runtime incompatibility.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the compiler and runtime would default to JDK 17 features, failing to utilize or comply with JDK 21 requirements.
